title: Shift canary traffic by weight with metric gates
description: Progressively move VirtualService weights to a new subset while watching golden signals, ready to revert by resetting weights.
body: Use when releasing a new version behind the mesh. Do not jump straight to 100% or shift weights without watching the canary's signals. Actions: deploy the new version as a subset, start with a small VirtualService weight (e.g. 5%), compare canary vs stable golden signals (latency, error rate), step the weight up on healthy metrics, and revert by resetting weights to stable if signals regress. Validation signals include per-subset metrics confirming the split ratio and the canary's error/latency tracking the stable baseline. Risk boundary: each weight increase on production traffic is a release step and the cutover to 100% is human-gated.
